title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Kozhikode. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About IIM Kozhikode:
IIM Kozhikode is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode!
